subject: [PATCH nfs-utils 05/17] build: add libnl3 and netlink header support for exportd and mountd

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: The patch series adds support for libnl3 and netlink headers to the exportd and mountd builds in nfs-utils. It updates the configure.ac file to include checks for libnl3, sunrpc_netlink.h, and linux/nfsd_netlink.h.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series adds support for libnl3 and netlink headers to the exportd and mountd builds in nfs-utils. It updates the configure.ac file to include checks for libnl3, sunrpc_netlink.h, and linux/nfsd_netlink.h. The changes ensure that the system header includes expkey support by checking for NFSD_A_EXPKEY_SEQNO.
